injuries: Adriel Santos Guimaraes (Atert Bissen) — sidelined, missed the first leg too; was the side's main creator last season with 10 assists and 8 goals
lineupHints: Roman Ferber expected to lead the line for Atert Bissen, with a start also expected for Rodrigues
KI Klaksvik: Pall Klettskard (12 goals in 25 appearances this season) expected to start in the final third
motivationFlags: KI Klaksvik lead the tie after a 2-1 first-leg win; Atert Bissen need to overturn the deficit at home
